description_long: This guard rail consists of a light-colored, wooden balustrade with vertical posts and a horizontal handrail, mounted atop a raised platform. The rail curves gently to follow the edge of a spiral staircase, providing a protective barrier along the upper level. The posts are evenly spaced and securely anchored into the platform, which is supported by sturdy columns. The overall structure is set on a checkered wooden floor, with a partial wall behind the rail for additional support. The design is functional and visually blends with residential or indoor urban environments, offering both safety and aesthetic appeal.
description: A light wood guard rail with vertical posts and a horizontal handrail, curving around a raised platform and spiral staircase, set on a checkered wooden floor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, the spiral staircase beneath, and the supporting columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the platform and the alignment of the posts along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the partial wall and the top of the guard rail, with the platform extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth of the platform and the vertical alignment of the posts.
